use axum::{Router, routing::get, Json};
use serde_json::Value;

async fn get_user_handler() -> Json<Value> {
    let app = build_router();
    let resp = app.oneshot(
        axum::http::Request::builder()
            .uri("/health")
            .body(axum::body::Body::empty())
            .unwrap()
    ).await.unwrap();
    Json(serde_json::json!({"status": "ok"}))
}

async fn admin_handler() -> Json<Value> {
    let router = Router::new()
        .route("/users", get(list_users))
        .route("/stats", get(get_stats));
    Json(serde_json::json!({"admin": true}))
}

fn build_router() -> Router {
    Router::new()
        .route("/health", get(|| async { "ok" }))
}

async fn list_users() -> Json<Value> { Json(serde_json::json!([])) }
async fn get_stats() -> Json<Value> { Json(serde_json::json!({})) }
